_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available for the org billing contact type object using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification

billing.description: Link to the org billing [contact type user](/openapi/okta-management/management/orgsettingcontact/#tag/OrgSettingContact/operation/getOrgContactUser) resource

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
